name: Ruined Watchtower
description: A crumbling stone tower stands on the hilltop, its upper floors collapsed but its spiral staircase still climbable. Signal-fire scars blacken the parapet.
dialogueOnInteract: You climb the cracked steps to the parapet and the world opens before you. Miles of rolling countryside stretch in every direction — the road a pale ribbon winding through green and gold. From here you can see the next town's smoke and, far distant, the spire of Grailsend catching the sun.
